title: Freshly Lightened American Glace Cherry Pudding
description: Bitter and light, this American dessert is a cozy treat featuring glace cherry. Perfect for a comforting evening snack.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, whisk together milk, sugar, and salt until sugar dissolves.
Add egg yolks to the saucepan and whisk until fully incorporated.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens and coats the back of a spoon.
Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
Add glace cherry and fold gently to combine.
Pour mixture into a 1-quart cazuela and refrigerate until chilled.
Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional glace cherry if desired.
If desired, sprinkle a pinch of sea salt on top for added depth of flavor.
